narrative:
Williams County has 24,088 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.8% of registrants.
